description_long: This object is a decorative candle set in an ornate, wide-based metal candlestick holder. The holder features a broad, circular base with a slightly weathered, antique brass finish, and a raised, rounded section adorned with a floral or fleur-de-lis motif. The candle itself is tall, slender, and white, extending vertically from the center of the holder. The metal base appears sturdy and heavy, designed to provide stability and prevent tipping. The surface of the holder shows some patina and minor imperfections, suggesting age or intentional vintage styling. The overall design is elegant and suitable for formal or historical urban settings, such as outdoor cafes, public plazas, or heritage parks.
description: A tall white candle set in an ornate, wide-based antique brass candlestick holder with decorative motifs and a weathered finish. The design is elegant and stable, ideal for formal or historical urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative motif on the rounded section of the brass holder and the full width of the circular base.
description_view_1: Side view with the motif partially visible and the base's patina and weathering more apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the motif on the holder and the even, circular shape of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with less motif detail visible, focusing on the smooth, aged brass surface of the base.
